purpose: Standalone stylesheet for the IDE Debug Console (REPL-style panel). Defines .debug-console container (#1a1a1a bg, #cccccc fg, monospace 'Cascadia Code'/'Fira Code'/'Consolas'), header with controls (clear/filter), output area, expression input prompt with chevron, and entry rows distinguished by type (log, warn, error, command, result).
gotchas: DUPLICATE: ide-debug.css ALSO defines .debug-console styles (lines 417-640 there). When changing, edit BOTH files or the styles may diverge.
Hard-coded colors (#1a1a1a, #1e1e1e, #cccccc, #333333, #999999) — does not respect theme switching.
Loaded ONLY by IDEView.jsx — relies on import order to override ide-debug.css's overlapping rules.
patterns: Monospace font stack 'Cascadia Code', 'Fira Code', 'Consolas' for REPL feel.
